title: iTop
description: Combodo iTop: open-source ITSM and CMDB platform for incident, problem, change, service management and a configuration database.
installation: iTop is a PHP app that requires MySQL/MariaDB (it does NOT support Postgres); a 'mariadb' add-on is provisioned. The vbkunin/itop image is the de-facto community image (no official Combodo image exists); the '-base' tag is Apache+PHP only, without a bundled DB, so it uses the external MariaDB add-on. The database connection is NOT set via env vars - on first run open the URL and complete the web setup wizard, entering DB host 'itop-mysql' port 3306, user 'itop', password 'itop', db 'itop' (rotate this password from its default before going live). The wizard also creates the admin account. The MYSQL_PASS env only seeds the bundled MySQL of the non-base image and is unused here. Persist /var/www/html/data and the generated /var/www/html/conf so config and attachments survive restarts.
